arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Man City to battle Bayern Munich for Florian Wirtz's signature
arts.sum: Man City is giving Bayern Munich some competition for the signature of Florian Wirtz. Transfer Talk is with the latest.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović still “gets on well” with Leon Goretzka, João Palhinha despite pushing them out of the Bayern Munich starting XI
arts.sum: But this season, with all three competing for playing time in Bayern’s midfield, Pavlović has the favor of new head coach Vincent Kompany and is leaving the competition in the dust, gathering nearly 4 times the amount of minutes Goretzka and Palhinha have assembled together. In the 2023/24, Bayern Munich ’s Leon Goretzka fought back from a poor start to regain a starting role for the vast majority of the season, João Palhinha was one of Fulham FC ’s most important players while Aleksandar Pavlović enjoyed an impressive debut campaign that nonetheless saw him relegated to what was mostly a supporting role.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Frans Krätzig is struggling for minutes despite being rated by VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart is very happy with Frans Krätzig so far. After an incredible pre-season with Bayern Munich and a brilliant goal against Liverpool FC, the youth player became a member of the senior team and impressed.

arts.ttl: Report: Manchester United joins Bayern Munich on list of clubs Sebastian Hoeness rejected
arts.sum: During the summer break, Manchester United contacted Sebastian Hoeneß (42), manager of VfB Stuttgart. Sebastian Hoeness, head coach of VFB Stuttgart and one of the masterminds behind their incredible leap from 16th in the Bundesliga to 2nd within a year, has a list of several top clubs that admire his coaching talents.

arts.ttl: Inside Spain: Kylian Mbappe’s night out, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Alphonso Davies hit headlines
arts.sum: Inside Spain is a weekly instalment brought to you by Football España, providing an insight into all of the major stories coming out of the rich and intense climes of La Liga and beyond. Those were not the headlines Kylian Mbappe wanted to make at Real Madrid. The forward skipped international duty with France in […] The post Inside Spain: Kylian Mbappe’s night out, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Alphonso Davies hit headlines appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Stuttgart preview: Hosts looking to remain unbeaten
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their unbeaten start to the Bundesliga season when they welcome Stuttgart to Allianz Arena on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany not ready to make drastic changes vs. VfB Stuttgart, but will be without Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: When you look at their games, they always want to play their way. For Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany, the match represents a chance to improve upon how things have looked of late.

arts.ttl: Barcelona held summit with Bayern Munich star’s agent
arts.sum: The transfer team at La Liga giants Barcelona held a meeting with the entourage of Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies earlier this year. That’s according to Jijantes, who have on…

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Preview | Bayern Munich vs Stuttgart – Vincent Kompany’s Bayern winless in their last three
arts.sum: The Bundesliga returns to action after a second international break of the season as leaders Bayern Munich host Stuttgart. Bayern currently occupy first place in the league via goal difference,…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Aleksandar Pavlović is the most efficient passing midfielder in the Bundesliga
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlovic has the best pass success rate of any midfielder in the Bundesliga this season (94.3%). The former Bayern ball boy quickly earned a reputation as an enforcer in the midfield, racking up six yellow cards in 19 appearances.
